caption: The video shows a screen recording of a digital interface featuring a spreadsheet and several menu options. A list of names and NBA teams is displayed on the left, including "Michael Leguizimo" for the "ATLANTA HAWKS" and "Carl Hagstrom" for the "CHARLOTTE HORNETS." To the right, a chat window shows messages from "🌐bowgu27" and "Nightbot." The message from "Nightbot" contains a blue hyperlink that reads, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/NzSdeK9O". A red and yellow logo for "JASPY'S CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible at the bottom of the screen, alongside a website URL, "WWW.JASYPCASEBREAKS.COM". Throughout the sequence, the display remains static, with no changes in the text, layout, or visual elements.
